positive: A majestic, detailed stylized portrait of a mythical owl, rendered in a linocut woodcut style. The owl is sitting on a branch, facing forward in a powerful, symmetrical pose. Its feathers are stylized with intricate geometric patterns, evoking both ancient wisdom and modern art deco aesthetics. The background should be solid, complementary dark teal, allowing the white and warm beige owl silhouette to pop with high contrast. Excellent negative space utilization, perfect for apparel printing, with clean, bold lines and rich textures. Centrally composed, full body view, hyper-detailed, minimalist graphic novel style.
